interface.name: Godot - .NET version
interface.summary: cross-platform 2D and 3D game engine with C# support
interface.description: Godot is a feature-packed, cross-platform game engine to create 2D and 3D games from a unified interface. It provides a comprehensive set of common tools, so that users can focus on making games without having to reinvent the wheel. Games can be exported with one click to a number of platforms, including the major desktop platforms (Linux, macOS, Windows), mobile platforms (Android, iOS), as well as Web-based platforms and consoles. The .NET version uses C# instead of GDScript.
